message:
🐛 Add focus trapping, error boundary, and aria improvements (#1749)

Three safety-net changes that cannot break existing behavior:

1. BaseModal: enable focus trapping so Tab cannot escape to background
   content. Uses the existing useModalFocusTrap hook that was already
   implemented but disabled by default. Adds aria-label to icon buttons.

2. Toast: add role="status" and aria-live="polite" so screen readers
   announce notifications. Add aria-label to dismiss button.

3. AppErrorBoundary: catch any unhandled React runtime error and show
   a recovery UI instead of a white screen. Wraps ChunkErrorBoundary
   which only handles stale chunk errors. Offers "Try again" (reset
   state) and "Reload page" options.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
